creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-03-16 20:43:17 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    emulators            Makefile 
  Added files:
    emulators/gns3       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    emulators/gns3/files patch-setup.py 
  Log:
  Graphical Cisco network simulator using Dynapips, Dynagen and Pemu.
  Important notice: users have to provide their own Cisco IOS to use with GNS3.
  
  WWW:    http://www.gns3.net
  
  PR:             ports/132689
  Submitted by:   Olivier Cochard-Labbe <olivier at cochard.me>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.269     +1 -0      ports/emulators/Makefile

  1.1       +3 -0      ports/emulators/gns3/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/emulators/gns3/files/patch-setup.py (new)

  1.1       +395 -0    ports/emulators/gns3/pkg-plist (new)
